code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut token = ""
    mut first = true
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i <= n
      mut is_space = false
      if i == n
        is_space = true
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
            is_space = true
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      if is_space
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            let sq = v * v
            if first
              out = "#{sq}"
              first = false
            else
              out = "#{out} #{sq}"
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
